decision: arm_g PRIMARY (ensemble >= best single arm on held-out pre-cutoff val)
method: majority vote of L2,L3,L4 — parameter-free, frozen in arms2.py
val_definition: per-judge persona-loop val slice (SEED=42, 25%), held out of L4 training; L3 retrieval pool excludes val items
disclosed_limitation: L2 pooled persona and other judges' retrieval pools saw these rows; per-row influence on a pooled persona is negligible.
